_comment: paper-autopilot-open configuration. Copy to ~/.claude/paper-autopilot-open/config.json and fill in your values. NEVER commit this file with real values.

api_keys._comment: gemini: figure image generation + default embeddings (required). openai: alternative embedding provider. anthropic: only for API-path corpus mining. storm_parse: PDF parsing backend (optional). tavily: ppt-image --ref web search (optional). storm_parse_language: optional output language for STORM parsing (auto | ko | en) — storm_parse.py reads api_keys.storm_parse_language, defaults to 'auto' when absent.

embedding._provider_comment: gemini (gemini-embedding-001) | openai (text-embedding-3-large). Must match the provider used when the corpus was built. supabase mode fixes the column type to vector(1024) — dimensions MUST stay 1024.

rag._mode_comment: local (default, no external DB) | supabase (own project) | disabled

paper_access._comment: Optional. Your institution's library proxy URL pattern with {URL} placeholder for institutional subscription access.
